{{InfoboxProject
|project=The Portal Group
|image=[[File:The-portal-group-icon-flat-dark.png]]
|topic=The Portal Community<br>[[The Portal Podcast]]
|leader=[https://twitter.com/brookedallas Brooke (pyrope#5830)]<br>[https://twitter.com/LBStone Brandon (Beefsandwich27#0143)]
|startdate=6 February 2020
|customlabel1=The Portal Discord Servers
|customdata1=[[The Portal Discord Servers|List]]
|customlabel2=Google Drive
|customdata2=[https://drive.google.com/drive/u/1/folders/16RkHA5OS1tYmsoQ4ldFzWGidZzDiUX26 Drive]
|customlabel3=Office Hours
|customdata3=[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1qSfaq8xPG8MmmwLANRvj21FF_j4llNR8Q7OQPK0SW-E/edit Notes]
|customlabel4=Discord Stats
|customdata4=[https://statbot.net/dashboard/674958932938195015 Dashboard]
|link1title=Website
|link1=[https://theportal.group/ Homepage]
|link2title=<!-- Projects Page -->
|link2=<!-- Projects Page Link -->
|link3title=Users
|link3=[https://users.theportal.wiki/ Interactive Database]
|link4title=Discord
|link4=[https://discord.gg/TDbpwzz Invite]
}}
The Portal Group exists to facilitate community projects in service to the ideas expressed by [[Eric Weinstein]] on [[The Portal Podcast]] and elsewhere. We use [https://discord.gg/TDbpwzz Discord] to organize and communicate, and we track projects on <!-- [https://www.google.com/ a custom database] and --> [[Projects|the wiki]]. We have also developed a [https://users.theportal.wiki/ user database] to keep track of the community's skills and interests, and we use [https://drive.google.com/drive/u/1/folders/16RkHA5OS1tYmsoQ4ldFzWGidZzDiUX26 Google Drive] to store files.
<!--

== Telos ==

-->
== Getting Involved ==
<div class="flex-container">
    <div class="flex-item">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===FAQ===
|content={{:The Portal Group Onboarding}}
}}
    </div>
    <div class="flex-item profile-container">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Who are Brooke, Brandon and Tim?===
|content=Tim, Brandon, and Brooke coordinate closely to manage The Portal Group and plan for its future.
====Brooke====
[[File:Brooke Profile.jpg|100px|right]]
Brooke works closely with Eric. Through developing [https://theportal.group/blog/ The Portal Blog], transcribing all content featuring [[Eric Weinstein]] and her frequent conversations with him, she is the best judge for how projects match up to the values of the Portal. If you have a high value project, it is worth showing her.

====Brandon====
[[File:Brandon Profile.jpg|100px|right]]
Brandon is a professional web developer and consultant. He runs the Discord server, built the [https://theportal.group website] and projects databases, and set up the [[Portal Wiki|wiki]]. He coordinates day to day management when he isn't deep in dev projects.

====Tim====
[[File:Tim Profile.png|100px|right]]
Tim is an Australian mathematics student who spends much of his time studying various topics in Differential Geometry and Algebraic Topology with guidance from Eric.
<br>
<br>
<br>
}}
    </div>
</div>

== Information ==
<div class="flex-container">
    <div class="flex-item">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Members===
|content=This is the list of core members who keep the ship running. For a full list of participants in Portal projects, see https://users.theportal.wiki/.
* [https://twitter.com/brookedallas Brooke] (pyrope#5830) - Leader, Proxy for [[Eric Weinstein|Eric]], [https://theportal.group/blog/ Blog]
* [https://twitter.com/LBStone Brandon] (Beefsandwich27#0143) - IT, Development and Wiki
* [https://twitter.com/Tim_Melon Tim] (Tim#7940) - Mathematics
* [https://twitter.com/boqu boqu] (boqu#9997) - Art
* [https://twitter.com/AardvarkLaurant Aardvark] (Aardvark#5610) - Wiki, transcripts
* [https://twitter.com/anisomorphism Nick] (ker(∂n)/im(∂n-1)≅πn(X), n≤dim(X)#7337) - Mathematics
}}
    </div>
    <div class="flex-item">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Resources===
|content=Resources the community has developed are available in the places listed.
* [https://discord.gg/TDbpwzz Discord]
* [https://users.theportal.wiki/ Users Database]
* [https://drive.google.com/drive/u/1/folders/16RkHA5OS1tYmsoQ4ldFzWGidZzDiUX26 Google Drive]
* [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1qSfaq8xPG8MmmwLANRvj21FF_j4llNR8Q7OQPK0SW-E/edit Office Hours Notes]

}}
    </div>
</div>

== Roles and Commands ==
<div class="flex-container">
    <div class="flex-item">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Discord Server Roles===
|content=Roles on the Discord server identify users' project interests and capabilities, and also restrict or enable permissions. <!-- They are granted by those with the "Roller" or "High Roller" roles or by users reacting to certain messages. -->
====Moderation Roles====
* Newb - Every new user gets this role. It will be removed once you start contributing to the community.
* Announcements - If you'd like to be notified of Announcements or Office Hours sessions, this is a good role to give yourself. (This is one of the few roles that users can add and remove themselves.)
* Welcoming Committee
* Acting Spammy
* A Bit Too Much
* Squeaky Wheel
* Lobby
====Project Roles====
* Climbing the Cliff
* Convex Hull
* GWT
* Mobile App
* Portal Blog
* Portal Book Club Organizers
* Portal Clips
* Portal Merch
* Portal Visualizations
* Riffs to Animate
* Russell Conjugation
* Transcripts
* Wiki Maintenance
}}
    </div>
    <div class="flex-item">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Discord Bot Commands===
|content=We've configured a bot with several helpful commands. Also, several less-than-helpful commands.

* '''!commands''' - Shows a link to this wiki page listing all the commands.
* '''!faq''' - Questions that have been frequently asked, here are.
* '''!rules''' - Lists our extensive set of strict and burdensome rules.
* '''!show''' - Provides an animated GIF kindly asking you to share your work.
* '''!chitchat''' - Gives a reminder that the projects server isn't for idle chitchat. Provides a link to [[The Portal Discord Servers]].
* '''!reiterate''' - Gives a re-reminder that the projects server isn't for idle chitchat. Provides another link to [[The Portal Discord Servers]].
* '''!startup''' - Oh. You don't want to make a project. You want to make a startup company. Let's dig into ramifications.
* '''!gu''' - It's fun to consider how demanding the [[Theory of Geometric Unity]] truly is.
* '''!graph'''
* '''!wall'''
* '''!tome'''}}
    </div>
    <div class="flex-item">
{{GenericBox
|header=
===Other Commands===
|content=You want commands? We got all the commands.
* !coffee
* !tea
* !calm
* !zen
* !numberwang
* !laugh
* !yada
* !bla
* !memes
* !intro
* !net
* !lobby
* !quest
* !shedding
* !read
}}
    </div>
</div>
__NOTOC__

[[Category:Community]]
[[Category:The Portal Group]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
